rootCause: PR #3933 added the new IndexedDB `meta` object store for lightweight checksums but left `DB_VERSION` at 1. Browsers with an existing v1 `dspaceGameState` database skipped `onupgradeneeded`, so every read/write to `meta` threw NotFoundError and forced the localStorage fallback alert on every load.
resolution: Bumped `dspaceGameState` schema version to 2 so existing installs run an IndexedDB upgrade and create the `meta` store before lightweight checksum writes.
